title: CRAYOLA Inspiration Art Case - 140 Pieces of Colouring Fun! | Includes Crayons, Markers, Pencils & Paper | Ideal for Kids Aged 5+
features: CRAYOLA KIDS ART KIT: This 140-piece drawing kit includes 1 Crayola Inspiration Art Case, 40 Washable Markers, 20 Short Colored Pencils, 64 Crayons, and 15 Large Pieces of Paper (9" x 13")
PORTABLE ART STUDIO: The compact and durable tie-dye art case lets kids take their art supplies wherever they go; the sturdy construction can withstand active use and frequent transport
VERSATILE ART SUPPLIES: Perfect for art class, creative projects at home, or holiday crafts, this comprehensive art kit has all the creative tools kids need
VIBRANT COLORS: The set includes a variety of colors, from bright and bold to soft and subtle, so kids can create artwork that pops
ORGANIZED AND EASY TO USE: The case includes trays and compartments to keep everything organized and accessible, making it easy for kids to find their supplies
EASTER GIFT FOR KIDS: Crayola Art Kits make a great gift for girls and boys on birthdays and holidays
SAFE AND NONTOXIC: This set is safe and nontoxic, ideal for ages 5 and up
description: From the manufacturer Inspiration Art Case Premier art set of 140 pieces Portable durable case for creating art anywhere Includes 30 sheets of drawing paper Snap-fit trays keep everything organised Recommended for ages four and older Crayola Inspiration Art Case Keep all your art supplies in one place with the Crayola Inspiration Art Case. This premier art set has 150 pieces-crayons, coloured pencils, markers, and drawing paper--all organised into a durable storage case that you can bring with you. What's in the Box: 64 crayons 22 short coloured pencils 20 pip-squeaks markers 20 supertips 30 sheets of paper (15 cm x 20 cm) 1 durable carry case Portable Art Studio for Creativity Anywhere You can have all the art tools you need whenever and wherever inspiration strikes with the Crayola Inspiration Art Case. Crayons, pencils, markers, and paper are neatly packed into a convenient carrying case. So no matter where you are, you can have a whole art studio at your fingertips. Everything You Need to Make a Masterpiece The Crayola Inspiration Art Case includes a variety of tools for colouring and drawing. Find just the right colour in a wide array of shades from the selection of 64 crayons and 40 washable markers. You can use the 20 short coloured pencils to draw or practice shading. And the kit even comes with 30 sheets of drawing paper. Ideal Gift for Almost Any Occasion Great for birthdays and holidays, the Crayola Inspiration Art Case allows you to give the gift of imagination and creativity to your favourite little artist. This set also makes a great companion for family holidays. Compartments Make Staying Organized Easy The Crayola Inspiration Art Case is specially designed to help keep all your drawing tools organized and in one place. The snap-fit trays offer a perfect place for each item and makes it easy to find the exact marker or pencil you're looking for. About Crayola: Art and Imagination Crayola art supplies and activities help children express, create, and connect through colourful play.
